item.title: LEGO Super Mario Adventures with Luigi Starter Course Toy for Kids Interactive Figure and Buildable Game Set Girls & Boys Gifts Age 6 Plus Creative Toys 71387
item.description: You can find LEGO Super Mario Adventures with Luigi Starter Course Toy for Kids Interactive Figure and Buildable Game Set Girls & Boys Gifts Age 6 Plus Creative Toys 71387 with a discount here: ℹ️: The LEGO Luigi figure is powered by 2 x AAA batteries (not included), delivering a highly interactive play experience with instant feedback Includes Pink Yoshi, Boom Boom and Bone Goomba LEGO Super Mario figures adding action from Start Pipe to Goal Pole - look how LEGO Luigi figure reacts to them LEGO Luigi has a colour sensor and an LCD screen to display many different instant reactions to movement and action bricks alongside his path This modular Super Mario toy can be combined with other LEGO Super Mario expansion sets; bringing unlimited play opportunities This LEGO Super Mario Adventures with Luigi Starter Course buildable toy game features a LEGO Luigi figure for fun interactive family or solo play The free LEGO app offers building instructions, creative tips and a safe platform for kids to share ideas - visit LEGO.

item.title: LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids here: ℹ️: Accessory elements include 7 wands, 3 tumblers, an umbrella, lantern, broom, sorting hat, cauldrons, potions, candles, brooms and many more This Hogwarts Castles Great Hall toy is a great birthday or Christmas Harry Potter Gift for kids who love the Wizarding World adventures! Also includes Professor Quirrell with dual Lord Voldemort face, Hagrid, Nearly Headless Nick, buildable Basilisk plus Hedwig & Scabbers figures The castles turret features the Mirror of Erised with changeable pictures and roosting spot for Fawkes figure This castles toy for kids 4-level tower features movable Grand Staircase spiral steps at its base, potions room, treasure room with chest Features Hogwarts Castles Great Hall with house banners, tower with movable spiral staircase, potions room and treasure room!
